description: Website Redesign Town Hall - Company update on the website transformation project

slides.title: Legacy System Limitations
slides.body:
• Outdated architecture — couldn't scale with our growth
• Poor mobile experience — 40% mobile bounce rate
• No integration with HubSpot — manual lead processes
• Limited SEO foundation — losing organic traffic to competitors
• Security vulnerabilities — end-of-life CMS components

slides.title: Market Expectations & Brand Alignment
slides.body:
• Buyers expect modern, fast-loading digital experiences
• Competitors invested heavily in content & SEO presence
• Brand had evolved — website didn't reflect who we are today
• Lead generation gap — competitors capturing market share
• DALP needed a showcase — our product deserved a better stage

slides.title: HubSpot CMS · Visual Identity · Programmatic Pages
slides.col1:
HubSpot CMS
• Enterprise-grade content management
• Native marketing automation integration
• Dynamic personalization
• Security & compliance built-in
slides.col2:
Visual Identity
• Complete brand refresh
• Consistent messaging across 177+ pages
• Mobile-first responsive design
• Speed-optimized components
slides.col3:
177 Programmatic Pages
• Automated landing pages
• Use-case specific paths
• Compliance & regulatory pages
• Regional/localized versions

slides.title: Content Infrastructure
slides.body:
• Blog infrastructure — structured content publishing workflow
• Schema markup — Organization, Product, Article, FAQ schemas
• Structured data for rich search results
• XML sitemap architecture for crawlers
• Internal linking framework for SEO

slides.title: SEO Performance: Before vs After
slides.col1:
Before
• 120 indexed pages
• No schema markup
• No programmatic content
• Limited keyword targeting
• Slow page loads (4.2s avg)
slides.col2:
After
• 310+ indexed pages
• Full schema implementation
• 177 programmatic pages
• Targeted keyword clusters
• Fast loads (1.8s avg)

slides.title: Visibility & Early Traffic
slides.col1:
GEO Strategy
• Location-specific landing pages
• Regional compliance content
• Local language variants (EN, AR, ZH)
• Hyperlocal keyword targeting
slides.col2:
Early Results
• 45% increase in organic sessions
• 60% more pages indexed
• 2.3x improvement in SERP positions
• 35% reduction in bounce rate

slides.title: Content & DALP Narrative
slides.subtitle: How we tell the SettleMint story

slides.title: DALP Storytelling: Platform · Value · Use Cases
slides.col1:
Platform Story
• Unified digital asset platform
• Asset class depth — Bonds, Equity, Funds, Real Estate
• Compliance & governance as pillar
• Security & trust differentiation
slides.col2:
Value Propositions
• Speed to market — launch in days
• Compliance by design
• Multi-asset capability
• Enterprise-grade scale
slides.col3:
Use Cases
• Tokenized Deposits — stablecoins
• Asset Backed Tokens
• Fund Tokenization
• Precious Metals

slides.title: Content Governance
slides.body:
• Editorial calendar — monthly content planning
• Review workflows — marketing + product sign-off
• Version control — HubSpot CMS workflow automation
• Performance monitoring — monthly traffic reviews
• Content refresh cycles — quarterly audit

slides.title: Roadmap & Maintenance
slides.body:
• Q2 2026 — Additional programmatic pages for new asset classes
• Q3 2026 — Advanced personalization & A/B testing
• Q4 2026 — Multi-language expansion (DE, FR, ES)
• Ongoing — Monthly content refresh, quarterly technical updates
• Maintenance — Shared responsibility marketing & dev

slides.title: Sales & Marketing Impact
slides.col1:
Marketing Enablement
• HubSpot integration — full funnel visibility
• Lead scoring — content engagement signals
• Campaign landing pages — customized paths
• Analytics — real-time performance dashboard
slides.col2:
Sales Support
• Dynamic content — personalized experiences
• Resource library — gated content for prospects
• Case study pages — social proof at scale
• Demo request flows — streamlined conversion
